name: Filters
description: Dedicated filter row that sits between TableTopBar and the table body. Hosts a Sort chip + separator + FilterChip groups + an add-filter Plus button with an optional dropdown of available filter columns.

props.name: showAdd
props.description: Whether to show the add-filter button

props.name: onAdd
props.description: Called when the add-filter button is clicked (only used when addMenu is NOT provided)

props.name: addMenu
props.description: Optional menu attached to the add-filter Plus button. When provided, clicking Plus toggles the menu open/closed instead of firing onAdd directly. Typically a <List> of <ListItem>s representing available filter columns.

states.rationale: The Filters root is a passive layout container with no state of its own. The trailing Plus add-filter Button has a tinted intent-neutral-subtle fill, so its hover/pressed states use OKLCH L-shift on that fill. Focus uses the shared focus-ring shadow. Composed children (Sort chip, FilterChips, popover lists) own their own state contracts.

keyboard.Tab: Move focus to the next control inside the filter row
keyboard.Shift+Tab: Move focus to the previous control
keyboard.Enter: Activate the Plus add-filter button (when focused)
keyboard.Space: Activate the Plus add-filter button (when focused)
keyboard.Escape: Close the add-filter menu when open

accessibility.focusManagement: Natural tab order across composed children. The Plus button is a native <button>. When addMenu is provided, the Plus exposes aria-haspopup="menu" + aria-expanded. The popover root carries role="menu". The popover closes on click-outside, Escape, or any click on a ListItem inside.

valueMapping.false: groups has Sort group only (no FilterChip entries)

propertyMapping.note: Figma-only structural toggle. selected=true shows Sort + filter chips + Plus; selected=false shows Sort + Plus only. In code, the presence/absence of FilterChip groups in the groups array drives this.
Each Figma chip in the slot corresponds to a groups[i].children entry. Dividers between groups are auto-rendered by Filters.

useWhen: Between a TableTopBar and the table body for sort + filter controls
Inside any view combining sort + multi-criteria filtering in a single horizontal bar
doNotUseFor: Primary action buttons → use the right slot of TableTopBar
Search → use SearchField in the left slot of TableTopBar
Bulk row actions → use a toolbar row anchored to selection

knownDeviations.description: Spec mentions --dls-color-component-filters-* tokens but they do not exist in tokens.json. CSS uses semantic surface/border/state tokens directly. Backfilling deferred.

The Figma selected boolean is a structural toggle showing different default slot contents (with vs without filter chips). In code, selected does not exist as a prop — the consumer drives the same effect via the groups array.
